flowTitle: Scout Brief → Brainstorming Specialist Handoff v2

actions.name: a3f8c912-7b4e-4d1a-9c6f-2e5b8d3a1047
actions.displayName: Context Pull 1 — Fetch Game Concepts Pipeline (live)

actions.name: b7e1d453-2a9c-4f8b-8e3d-6c4f9a2b5e81
actions.displayName: Context Pull 2 — Fetch Game Family Registry (live)

actions.name: c2d5e847-3f1a-4c9b-7d2e-8a6b3f4c9e15
actions.displayName: Context Pull 3 — Fetch K-12 Curriculum Map (live)

actions.name: d9f4b261-8c3e-4a7d-6b5f-1e2c9a8d4f73
actions.displayName: Context Compile — Compress Pipeline + Registry + Curriculum into Context Block

input.prompt:
You are a context compiler for the K-12 Math Game Studio. Compress three JSON node datasets into a structured reference block for the Brainstorming Specialist.

Output exactly THREE sections with no preamble:

## GAME CONCEPTS PIPELINE
For each game concept row, one line: title | Pipeline Stage | GO/NO-GO | Delight Gate. Skip any header or template rows (rows without a real game title).

## GAME FAMILY REGISTRY
For each family: Family Name | Coverage status | Member Games listed.

## CURRICULUM MAP — OPEN SLOTS
Only rows where Status = Open Slot or In Brainstorm: Grade Band | Subject | Core Skill | Status.

Be completely terse. No prose sentences. This is a machine-readable reference block.

actions.name: e5c7a934-1b6f-4e8d-a2c9-7f3d5b8e2a46
actions.displayName: Step 1 — Brainstorming Specialist: Generate Full Game Design Plan

input.prompt: Extract only the game title from this game design plan. Return just the title — nothing else. No quotes, no punctuation, no explanation.

actions.name: a1b3c5d7-e9f2-4a6b-8c0d-2e4f6a8b0c1d
actions.displayName: Step 3 — Write Full Plan to Game Concepts Pipeline

data.value: SOURCE: Subject Expansion Scout handoff. Risk flags: {{ trigger["risk_flags"] }}
